Confirming your payment.

We verify the Stripe payment before opening your calendar.

Checking the Stripe payment…

After Stripe confirms payment, this page opens the calendar for your plan. A final confirmation email arrives after you book.

Not redirecting?

Use the link below when the calendar does not open automatically.

Open the booking calendar →

For help, text or call 416-771-0382 and your session can be arranged directly.
